records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The fog of the plague is already thick in this land.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The fog of the plague is already thick in this land.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The fog of the plague is already thick in this land.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That black armor... Is that Mors...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That black armor... Is that Mors...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That black armor... Is that Mors...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mors? What's Mors doing here...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mors? What's Mors doing here...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mors? What's Mors doing here...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The apocalypse will soon come to this world...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The apocalypse will soon come to this world...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The apocalypse will soon come to this world...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why have you trespassed upon this fog-bound land, outsiders from beyond?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why have you trespassed upon this fog-bound land, outsiders from beyond?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why have you trespassed upon this fog-bound land, outsiders from beyond?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Look, Laika!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Look, Laika!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Look, Laika!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mors is blowing the C.O.s away!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mors is blowing the C.O.s away!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mors is blowing the C.O.s away!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't think she remembers us...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't think she remembers us...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't think she remembers us...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know what's going on, but she helped us last time. So let's hope she's still on our side here...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know what's going on, but she helped us last time. So let's hope she's still on our side here...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know what's going on, but she helped us last time. So let's hope she's still on our side here...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The fog of the plague still thickens. A sure sign of the world's irreversible collapse.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The fog of the plague still thickens. A sure sign of the world's irreversible collapse.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The fog of the plague still thickens. A sure sign of the world's irreversible collapse.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You must turn back, young girls. This place is not meant for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You must turn back, young girls. This place is not meant for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You must turn back, young girls. This place is not meant for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you keep going, your small, fragile lives will surely be lost.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you keep going, your small, fragile lives will surely be lost.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you keep going, your small, fragile lives will surely be lost.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Be quiet, black armor...! I've heard enough danger warnings to last a lifetime...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Be quiet, black armor...! I've heard enough danger warnings to last a lifetime...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Be quiet, black armor...! I've heard enough danger warnings to last a lifetime...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I came all this way just to turn tail, I wouldn't have suited up in this damn diving suit to begin with...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I came all this way just to turn tail, I wouldn't have suited up in this damn diving suit to begin with...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I came all this way just to turn tail, I wouldn't have suited up in this damn diving suit to begin with...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Laika's right!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Laika's right!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Laika's right!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We have to find that kid, Mors!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We have to find that kid, Mors!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We have to find that kid, Mors!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That kid...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That kid...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That kid...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't remember her name or her face...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't remember her name or her face...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't remember her name or her face...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But in my memory, she always had a smile.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But in my memory, she always had a smile.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But in my memory, she always had a smile.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The time we spent together and the memories we shared are still with me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The time we spent together and the memories we shared are still with me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The time we spent together and the memories we shared are still with me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why we can't just stop here, not in a place like this...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why we can't just stop here, not in a place like this...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why we can't just stop here, not in a place like this...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Divinity response detected...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Divinity response detected...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Divinity response detected...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Laika, the Telescope's pointing this way...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Laika, the Telescope's pointing this way...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Laika, the Telescope's pointing this way...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good. No time to second-guess ourselves now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good. No time to second-guess ourselves now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good. No time to second-guess ourselves now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's move, kid! This time, we're not showing up late...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's move, kid! This time, we're not showing up late...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's move, kid! This time, we're not showing up late...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not showing up late this time...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not showing up late this time...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not showing up late this time...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The death throes of this dying world echo in my ears...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The death throes of this dying world echo in my ears...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The death throes of this dying world echo in my ears...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Drawn by those dreadful screams, surely the undying shall appear once more...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Drawn by those dreadful screams, surely the undying shall appear once more...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Drawn by those dreadful screams, surely the undying shall appear once more...

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the end, this is also a sin that stems from my foolishness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the end, this is also a sin that stems from my foolishness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the end, this is also a sin that stems from my foolishness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then I shall fight to the very end as it is the only penance I have left.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then I shall fight to the very end as it is the only penance I have left.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then I shall fight to the very end as it is the only penance I have left.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But in my memory, she always had a smile.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But in my memory, she always had a smile.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But in my memory, she always had a smile.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The time we spent together and the memories we shared are still with me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The time we spent together and the memories we shared are still with me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The time we spent together and the memories we shared are still with me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's why...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's why...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's why...

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's why we can't just stop here, not in a place like this...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's why we can't just stop here, not in a place like this...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's why we can't just stop here, not in a place like this...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Divinity response detected...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Divinity response detected...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Divinity response detected...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Laika, the Telescope's pointing this way...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Laika, the Telescope's pointing this way...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Laika, the Telescope's pointing this way...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Good. No time to second-guess ourselves now!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Good. No time to second-guess ourselves now!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Good. No time to second-guess ourselves now!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's move, kid! This time, we're not showing up late...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's move, kid! This time, we're not showing up late...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's move, kid! This time, we're not showing up late...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Not showing up late this time...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Not showing up late this time...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Not showing up late this time...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The death throes of this dying world echo in my ears...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The death throes of this dying world echo in my ears...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The death throes of this dying world echo in my ears...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Drawn by those dreadful screams, surely the undying shall appear once more...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Drawn by those dreadful screams, surely the undying shall appear once more...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Drawn by those dreadful screams, surely the undying shall appear once more...

root.m_Talk_ENG: In the end, this is also a sin that stems from my foolishness.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In the end, this is also a sin that stems from my foolishness.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In the end, this is also a sin that stems from my foolishness.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then I shall fight to the very end as it is the only penance I have left.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then I shall fight to the very end as it is the only penance I have left.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then I shall fight to the very end as it is the only penance I have left.
